meaning: n.偶像破坏者,提倡打破旧习的人
examples: Fear is a major impediment to thinking like an iconoclast and stops the average person in his tracks.
But he shows little sign of being an iconoclast.
Throughout his career, Oshima remained a provocateur and iconoclast.
One would never suspect that this iconoclast was a self-described "military brat" from Lansing, Mich.
Jobs is a classic iconoclast, one who aggressively seeks out, attacks and overthrows conventional ideas.
